subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of the Beauty of the All-Merciful! A company is gathered here, and His Holiness Zaynu'l-Muqarrabín is present as witness, whilst some from without are also attending [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای جمال رحمن جمعی حاضر و حضرت زین المقربین نیز ناظر و از خارج بعضی در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for protection
